narrative:
Beaver Twp township has 4,828 registered voters, with 56.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.2%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.6 percentage points.
